title: Adventure+
description: This modpack aims to take Minecraft's exploration to a new plane, with mods like Yung's "Better Structure" mods, and new ways to get to them, with "Eureka."
body:
Minecraft structures and exploration could be improved in many ways, so why not make the former bigger, and the latter more enjoyable. 

Welcome to... (You already read the title)... Adventure+ !

With the pack being fine-tuned to find the right balance of exploration with Yung's mods and Explorify, and settling down to make machines with Create, enjoy a true vanilla+ experiance, (and multiplayer support), with this modpack!

Thank you for reading my extendended ~~Stalling~~ _Rant_, and enjoy!
